title: Surgeon Vacancy at Bombay Hospital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Bombay Hospital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Bombay Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bombay Hospital:
Bombay Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
